seo.title: Userlike Alternatives for E-commerce: Find the Best Solution | Replyma
seo.description: Looking for a Userlike alternative? Compare Userlike to Replyma, Gorgias, Zendesk, and more. Find the best AI-powered customer support platform for your...

content.intro: Userlike is a popular live chat solution, particularly among European SMBs. While it offers solid chat functionality and WhatsApp-style messaging, e-commerce businesses often find themselves needing more robust features for managing customer support, especially when dealing with order-specific inquiries, returns, and shipping issues. If you're outgrowing Userlike's capabilities, it's time to explore alternatives.
why_look_for_alternatives: **Limited E-commerce Functionality:** Userlike's core focus isn't e-commerce. Order details, shipping information, and return requests require extensive integrations, adding complexity and cost.

**Basic AI Capabilities:** While Userlike offers some AI features, they may not be sophisticated enough to handle complex e-commerce queries like 'Where is my order?' or 'How do I return this item?' without human intervention.
**Lack of Full Helpdesk Features:** Userlike lacks a comprehensive ticketing system, making it difficult to track and manage customer issues effectively, especially as your business grows.
**Siloed Communication Channels:** Userlike primarily focuses on chat. If you need to unify email, chat, and other channels into a single platform, you'll need additional tools and integrations.

alternatives.name: Replyma
alternatives.tagline: AI-powered customer support built for e-commerce.
alternatives.description: Replyma is an AI customer support platform designed specifically for e-commerce businesses. It unifies email and chat, provides order context, and uses AI to resolve common e-commerce questions automatically. Unlike Userlike, Replyma offers a full helpdesk with ticketing and deep e-commerce integrations, allowing for faster resolutions and improved customer satisfaction.
alternatives.best_for: E-commerce businesses seeking AI-powered automation and a unified customer support platform.
alternatives.pricing: Usage-based pricing, scales with your support volume. Free trial available.
pros: AI-powered resolution of e-commerce inquiries (e.g., order tracking, returns)
Unified email and chat channels with order context
Full helpdesk with ticketing and workflow automation
cons: Newer platform compared to established players like Zendesk
Focus solely on e-commerce might not suit businesses with diverse support needs

alternatives.name: Gorgias
alternatives.description: Gorgias is a popular helpdesk solution tailored for e-commerce brands, offering live chat, email, and social media support. It integrates deeply with Shopify, Magento, and other e-commerce platforms, providing agents with order information and customer data directly within the helpdesk.
alternatives.best_for: Shopify and Magento stores looking for a dedicated e-commerce helpdesk.
alternatives.pricing: Tiered pricing based on the number of tickets.
pros: Deep integrations with Shopify, Magento, and other e-commerce platforms
Automation rules and macros to streamline support workflows
Unified view of customer data and order history
cons: Can be expensive for high-volume support
AI features are less advanced than Replyma's

alternatives.name: Zendesk
alternatives.description: Zendesk is a widely used customer service platform that offers a broad range of features, including live chat, ticketing, knowledge base, and community forums. While not specifically designed for e-commerce, it can be customized to meet the needs of online retailers.
alternatives.best_for: Businesses of all sizes needing a versatile and scalable customer service solution.
alternatives.pricing: Tiered pricing based on features and number of agents.
pros: Wide range of features and integrations
cons: Can be complex to set up and manage

alternatives.name: Tidio
alternatives.tagline: Live chat and chatbots for small businesses.
alternatives.description: Tidio is a live chat and chatbot platform designed for small businesses. It offers a free plan and affordable paid plans, making it a popular choice for startups and entrepreneurs. While Tidio offers some e-commerce integrations, its features are less comprehensive than dedicated e-commerce helpdesks.
alternatives.best_for: Small businesses looking for an affordable and easy-to-use live chat solution.
pros: Easy to set up and use
cons: AI capabilities are less advanced than Replyma's

alternatives.name: Help Scout
alternatives.tagline: Customer support software for growing businesses.
alternatives.description: Help Scout offers a clean and intuitive interface for managing customer support. It provides email support, live chat, and a knowledge base, but lacks some of the advanced features of more comprehensive helpdesk solutions. While not specifically e-commerce focused, it can be a good option for smaller online stores.
alternatives.best_for: Small to medium-sized businesses seeking a user-friendly customer support platform.
alternatives.pricing: Tiered pricing based on features and number of users.

alternatives.name: Freshdesk
alternatives.description: Freshdesk is a cloud-based customer support software that offers a wide range of features, including ticketing, knowledge base, live chat, and social media support. It's a popular choice for businesses of all sizes, but requires integrations for deep e-commerce functionality.
alternatives.best_for: Businesses needing a comprehensive and scalable customer support solution.
cons: Can be complex to set up and manage

alternatives.name: LiveChat
alternatives.description: LiveChat is a dedicated live chat platform that offers a variety of features, including chat routing, canned responses, and file sharing. While it can be used by e-commerce businesses, it lacks the comprehensive helpdesk features of other solutions.
alternatives.best_for: Businesses primarily focused on live chat support.
alternatives.pricing: Tiered pricing based on features and number of agents.
pros: Easy to set up and use

alternatives.name: Zoho Desk
alternatives.description: Zoho Desk is a help desk software that offers a range of features, including ticketing, knowledge base, live chat, and social media support. It integrates with other Zoho products, making it a good option for businesses already using the Zoho ecosystem. E-commerce functionality requires integrations.
alternatives.best_for: Businesses already using Zoho products or needing a comprehensive help desk solution.
cons: Can be complex to set up and manage

alternatives.name: Intercom
alternatives.description: Intercom is a customer messaging platform that offers live chat, in-app messaging, and email marketing features. It's often used by SaaS companies and businesses with complex customer journeys. While it can be used for e-commerce, it's not specifically designed for it.
alternatives.best_for: SaaS companies and businesses with complex customer journeys.
alternatives.pricing: Complex pricing based on usage and features.

alternatives.name: Kayako
alternatives.tagline: Help desk software with integrated live chat.
alternatives.description: Kayako is a help desk software that offers integrated live chat, ticketing, and knowledge base features. It's a good option for businesses needing a unified customer support platform. E-commerce functionality requires integrations.
alternatives.best_for: Businesses needing a unified customer support platform with integrated live chat.
alternatives.pricing: Tiered pricing based on features and number of agents.
cons: Can be complex to set up and manage

faq.question: What are the key differences between Replyma and Userlike?
faq.answer: Replyma is specifically built for e-commerce, offering features like order context, AI-powered resolution of e-commerce inquiries, and a unified helpdesk with ticketing. Userlike is primarily a live chat solution with limited e-commerce functionality and basic AI.

faq.question: Is Replyma suitable for small e-commerce businesses?
faq.answer: Yes, Replyma offers usage-based pricing that scales with your support volume, making it an affordable option for small e-commerce businesses. You only pay for what you use.

faq.question: Does Replyma integrate with Shopify?
faq.answer: Yes, Replyma integrates with Shopify and other popular e-commerce platforms, providing agents with order information and customer data directly within the helpdesk.

faq.question: Can Replyma automate customer support?
faq.answer: Yes, Replyma uses AI to resolve common e-commerce questions automatically, such as 'Where is my order?' or 'How do I return this item?', reducing the workload on your support team.

faq.question: What if I need help setting up Replyma?
faq.answer: Replyma offers comprehensive documentation and support to help you get started. Our team is available to answer your questions and guide you through the setup process.

content.cta_text: Ready to see how Replyma can transform your e-commerce customer support? Start your free trial today!
